title: Simple Health Bar
description: Simple Health Bar mod that changes the way your health is displayed
body:
# Simple Health Bar

### Simple Health Bar replaces the default health rendering of minecraft with a cool health bar

If you want a full mod for all status bars, check out [All HUD Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/all-hud-bars)

- Supports **Wither, Poison, Freezing** colors
- Supports **custom maximum health**
- Supports **absorption**
 
### Current supported versions:

- **Fabric 1.18.2 - 1.21.8**
- **Forge 1.18.2 - 1.20.1**
